mapper.select: SELECT ACCESS_TOKEN as accessToken , REMOVE_YN as removeYn , CLIENT_ID as clientId , CLIENT_SECRET as clientSecret FROM MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN WHERE CLIENT_ID = #{clientId} AND CLIENT_SECRET = #{clientSecret}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN( ISSUE_DATE , CLIENT_ID , CLIENT_SECRET , ACCESS_TOKEN , REMOVE_YN , SYS_RDATE , SYS_UDATE , USERID , UPDATE_USERID ) VALUES ( TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , #{clientId} , #{clientSecret} , #{accessToken} , 'N' , SYSDATE , SYSDATE , 'SYSTEM' , 'SYSTEM' )
mapper.select: SELECT ACCESS_TOKEN as accessToken ,REMOVE_YN as removeYn ,CLIENT_ID as clientId ,CLIENT_SECRET as clientSecret FROM MCP_ACCESS_TOKEN WHERE CLIENT_ID = #{clientId} AND CLIENT_SECRET = #{clientSecret} AND SYS_RDATE >= (SYSDATE - (55 / (24 * 60)))
